_labels_note: Calc-only labels (monthly/downPayment/term/mileage/residual) are best-effort against the milesFinance widget vocabulary observed on the live form (Maandbedrag, /maand, Laatste maandelijkse betaling). They are only consulted when the page renders a real calculation (data-has-calculation-information=True); that block is reCAPTCHA-gated for automation, so these are usually unused. Vehicle price + model are parsed structurally (not via these labels). Tune these once a calculated page is captured.
